title: Make images visible in Form Response Viewer

posts.author: ben221199 (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

At the moment it isn’t possible to directly view images in Form Response Viewer. First I have to click on it, and then Monday will open a download link in a new tab:

I want to export the item to PDF using the “Save as PDF”-button:

Maybe I also want to set the size of the image in the PDF, but that is less important.

Thank in advance

Ben
